ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR First And Final Account
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Continued To Oct-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Leroux for Nelly Chin.

Mr. Leroux stated that they were looking into whether they are going to a waiver of account or a final account. Mr. Leroux also stated that there is a long standing law suit between his Client and the Trust that owns the other 50% of the property, that there is no cooperation with the Trustee, that his Client's Husband and his Brother own the property and that it was taken out of the Trust for financing. In addition, Mr. Leroux stated that his Client understands the action filed, that she has litigation Counsel in that matter, raised the issue of obtaining waivers from all of his Client's Children and stated that the Brother died in San Francisco. The First and Final Account filed on November 16, 2012 is put back on calendar for October 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to either amend the petition for waiver of account or file an appropriate accounting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Continued To Feb-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Feb-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Leroux for Nelly Chin (Executor).

Mr. Leroux stated that they have the appraisal, that the Client is arguing that the appraisal is not accurate, that the property was taken out of the Trust for refinancing and that the property was never put back in the Trust. In addition, Mr. Leroux stated that the final account will be ready to be filed in a few days, and that he has given notice to the Creditors and the Franchise Tax Board. Status on filing of the Inventory and Appraisal and Petition for Final Distribution was continued to December 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
